success.description: You foresee misfortune for your foes. Place any one die from your dice pool on this card, being careful to preserve its rolled face. This action card does not recharge while that die is on it. When an enemy within medium range makes a check that includes a die of that type in its dice pool, you may force him to take the die from this card and place it directly into his results pool instead of rolling that particular die.
As above, and you may add a second die from your pool to this card. This card doesn't recharge until both dice are spent. Both dice can be spent on the same check or used on different checks

sigmarsComet.description: Turn one to its blank face, then place it on this card. Do this only if the spell has been successfully cast
